name: Oil Red O Staining
nameCn: Oil Red O 脂肪染色

components.name: Stock: 0.5 g Oil Red O in 100 mL isopropanol
Working: 3 parts stock + 2 parts ddH₂O, filter

notes.en: Stains neutral lipids red-orange. Working solution must be freshly prepared. Quantify by extracting with isopropanol, OD510.
notes.zh: 将中性脂肪染成红橙色。工作液须现配。定量：异丙醇提取，OD510。

usage.en: Oil Red O stain for detecting intracellular lipid droplets in adipocytes.
usage.zh: 油红 O 染色，用于检测脂肪细胞内的脂滴。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Oil Red O (0.5 g) in 100 mL isopropanol to make stock (0.5%).
For working solution: mix 3 parts stock with 2 parts ddH₂O (0.3% final).
Let stand 10 min, then filter through 0.22 µm.
Prepare working solution fresh before each use.
Store stock at room temperature for up to 12 months.
